Title: Idle Zoo World
Description: Engine Integration: Efficiently implemented assets and optimized technical performance.
UX Design: Created comprehensive flows to guide UI and enhance player experience.
Shaders & VFX: Developed our own shaders and effects to elevate game atmosphere.
Collaboration: Aligned technical execution with Art and Game Design requirements.
footer:
Idle Resource Management Game, where players can build and manage their own zoo.
Attracting visitors and earning money to expand their collection of animals and facilities.

Title: Glass Jam

Title: Recycle Jam

UX Planning: Designed efficient, user-centric game flow.

footer: Merge-3 Puzzle Game, where players pick up and merge bottles in the ocean to clear levels and progress through the game.

Title: Myth Showdown
Description: UX Analysis: Deconstructed competitor mechanics to design an intuitive and accessible user flow.

Title: Hex Flow
Description: Market-Driven UX: Conducted competitor research to align user flows with game design specifications.
Feedback System: Planned gameplay feedback, visual effects, and Win/Loss screen states.
footer: Pixel Flow like Puzzle game, where player sends colored rabbits to the tray and tries to clear the hexagonal level

Title: Coffee GO!
Description: Market Research: Analyzed competitor mechanics to design comprehensive Figma boards for game systems and boosters.
UX Layout: Designed screen layouts and navigation structures based on research insights.
2D VFX & Shaders: Implemented 2D visual effects and shaders to enhance game aesthetics.
UI Animation: Created end-of-level animations to provide player feedback and polish.
Team Collaboration: Contributed as part of a 10-person cross-functional development team.
footer: Puzzle Game, where player clicks on colored cups inside trays trying to clear the level by sending them to the correct colored trays

Title: Hidden Match World

Feedback Design: Defined multi-sensory feedback for every screen, including sound, VFX, and haptics.
UI Implementation: Integrated UI elements into engine prefabs according to UX specifications.
Custom VFX: Developed game-specific visual effects to enhance player engagement.

Title: Spaceship Defense TD
Description: UX Layout & Analysis: Deconstructed reference mechanics to design comprehensive screen layouts and navigation.
FTUE & Narrative: Designed a user-friendly First Time User Experience (FTUE) integrated with game narrative.
Feedback Mapping: Defined and mapped multi-sensory gameplay feedback within Figma for implementation.
Dynamic VFX: Developed procedural visual effects for game towers, maintaining a clean and organized project structure.
footer: Tower Defense Game, where player chooses towers and upgrades for his ship and defends against waves of enemies.

Title: Miasma
MyTitle: Tech Artist, UX Designer, Level Design
SubTitle: College Project
Description: UX Design: Designed core menus and UI screens (Main, Win/Loss) inspired by survival horror mechanics.
Player Journey: Defined the end-to-end player experience and emotional journey through the game.
Level Design & Lighting: Executed level assembly, prop placement, and dynamic lighting to establish a horror atmosphere.
Atmospheric VFX: Developed environmental effects to enhance immersion and suspense.
Technical Art Lead: Led the Tech Art & UX department, coordinating with Art and Game Design teams to define and execute tasks.
footer: 2.5D Sidescroller Lovecraftian Horror Game where Marie, a ship captain's daughter, navigates a storm-wracked vessel while experiencing terrifying visions that blur reality and nightmare.

Title: Chefhero
SubTitle: Extra-Curricular Project
Description: Technical Art Ownership: Acted as the sole Tech Artist, evolving the role from VFX creation to full technical implementation.
VFX & Interaction: Developed extensive visual effects for combat mechanics and environmental interactions.
Level Design & Balancing: Created playable levels using Tilemaps and props to define gameplay difficulty and combat flow.
Iterative QA: Conducted rigorous team testing and QA sessions to refine mechanics and resolve issues.
Award-Winning Development: Won the 'Incubator' competition, leading to a professional contract at Clover Bite studio.
footer: 2D Bullet Heaven Sidescroller where a Chef saves his restaurant from invading food monsters using kitchen utensils and cooking tools.

Title: Horde Switch
SubTitle: Multiplayer powered by Photon Fusion
Description: Board-to-Digital Adaptation: Translated physical board game mechanics into a seamless digital user experience.
VFX & Visual Feedback: Developed 3D visual effects and interactive feedback to enhance digital gameplay.
3D Transition: Led the technical shift from 2D to 3D environments within a collaborative team setting.
Rapid Development: Executed the project as a high-impact mini-capstone under academic timelines.
footer: 3D Multiplayer Card Game, where players are constantly trying to survive against enemies and outlive the opponent

Title: Dead Lift
SubTitle: Global Game Jam Project

Asset & VFX Creation: Developed targeted 3D/2D assets and visual effects to fit the game’s core mechanics.
Character Concepting: Collaborated on the creative direction and adaptation of iconic characters into game-ready zombie variants.
Award-Winning Performance: Secured 2nd place out of hundreds of participants in a competitive national Game Jam.
footer: Local Multiplayer game about getting at the highest point of a zombie tower

Title: Poo Master
